testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iteration99_comprehensive.py:37: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_offer_generator_config
test_story_hook_config
test_daily_viral_ideas_public
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration99_comprehensive.py:203: in test_daily_viral_ideas_public assert response.status_code in [200, 401] E assert 404 in [200, 401] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_comment_reply_config

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'intents' in {'downloadCost': 1, 'maxCommentLength': 500, 'modes': [{'credits': 5, 'id': 'single', 'name': 'Single Reply Set', 'replies': 4}, {'credits': 15, 'id': 'full_pack', 'name': 'Full Reply Pack', 'replies': 12}], 'replyTypes': ['funny', 'smart', 'sales', 'short']}

testcase.name: test_wallet_balance
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration99_comprehensive.py:333: in test_wallet_balance assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
